title: Neo-Brutalism Style
description: A high-impact Neo-Brutalist design system characterized by 'Acid' aesthetics. It features high-contrast color palettes (off-white, deep black, and neon yellow), heavy-weight typography, and 'hard' UI elements like non-blurred shadows and thick borders. The layout utilizes bento grids, oversized display text, and dynamic marquee components. Suitable for creative agencies, experimental e-commerce, fintech, and portfolio sites looking for a 'loud', digital-first brand identity.
